creator: keith@ml.tw.FreeBSD.org
text:
The program used to generate kcfonts doesn't follow XLFD, so
sometimes X apps can't find suitable fonts for Big5 encoding
and then crash.

Fix: Please commit the following patch, thanks.
	
How-To-Repeat: 
Specify kcfonts in X apps' fontset resource, like Netscape or
XEmacs, then it'll crash upon launching.
